headline: DE Q1 Deep Dive: Margin Pressures Offset Revenue Gains Amid Tariff Volatility
summary: Agricultural and construction machinery company Deere (NYSE:DE) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.7% year on year to $13.37 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $6.55 per share was 15% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
